name: 18 · Stream Pipeline
description: Three-stage streaming pipeline, all Python: producer → transform → reducer. The producer (streamOutput) emits 4 lowercase word chunks (the/quick/brown/fox). The transform is BOTH a stream consumer AND producer (streamInput + streamOutput): it receives each chunk via aithericon.chunks(), uppercases it, and re-emits it on its own stream via set_output. The reducer (streamInput) receives the transform's chunks and concatenates them into 'THE QUICK BROWN FOX'. Each stage runs as a long-lived process fed over IPC; the control edges (producer.out→transform.in, transform.out→reducer.in) carry stream_count and trigger each stage's EOF.
